palette_notes: Dark navy sky background (#0a0e1f). Player is white/cyan. Enemies: Scout=acid green, Bomber=deep purple/amber, Interceptor=crimson/silver. Boss is gunmetal with orange/magenta phase glows. Bullets escalate: white, yellow, blue, lime, violet. Explosions: white flash → orange fire → dark smoke. Pickups glow gold. All sprites on solid black background, no anti-aliasing, crisp limited palette.

sprites.name: player
sprites.label: Player Jet
sprites.prompt: pixel art top-down fighter jet sprite, black background, white titanium body with cyan cockpit glow, twin engine exhausts at base, clean military silhouette pointing upward, retro shooter, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing

sprites.name: scout
sprites.label: Scout Enemy
sprites.prompt: pixel art top-down enemy scout aircraft sprite, black background, acid green body with dark olive wing shadows, small fast delta-wing shape pointing downward, aggressive minimal design, retro shooter, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing

sprites.name: bomber
sprites.label: Bomber Enemy
sprites.prompt: pixel art top-down enemy bomber aircraft sprite, black background, deep purple body with amber underbelly, wide wingspan pointing downward, heavy silhouette, chunky pixel shading, retro shooter, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing

sprites.name: interceptor
sprites.label: Interceptor Enemy
sprites.prompt: pixel art top-down enemy interceptor aircraft sprite, black background, blood crimson body with silver canard fins, narrow swept-wing profile pointing downward, menacing angular design, retro shooter, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing

sprites.name: pickup
sprites.label: Weapon Pickup
sprites.prompt: pixel art collectible power-up sprite, black background, spinning golden diamond shape, bright gold with white highlight pixels at corners, glowing aura border, retro shooter, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing
